# Ludwitt

> AI-powered adaptive learning platform with two tracks: (1) Basics — adaptive K-12 + adult literacy/numeracy (Math, Reading, Logic, Latin, Greek, Writing) addressing the PIAAC crisis where 28% of US adults struggle with basic literacy, and (2) Developer Training — learn to build with AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw) through guided projects, deployment, and open-source contributions.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://your-domain.com/): Landing page and main dashboard
- [Login](https://your-domain.com/login): Sign in or create an account
- [Developer Training](https://your-domain.com/alc): Learn to build with AI coding tools

## Basics — Adaptive Learning

- [Basics Dashboard](https://your-domain.com/basics): Math, Reading, Logic, Latin, Greek, Writing
- [Leaderboard](https://your-domain.com/basics/leaderboard): Gamification and progress rankings
- [Achievements](https://your-domain.com/basics/achievements): Badges and milestones
- [Cohorts](https://your-domain.com/basics/cohorts): Group learning with mentors
- [Study Rooms](https://your-domain.com/basics/study-rooms): Collaborative video learning

## Developer Training (ALC)

- [Developer Training Dashboard](https://your-domain.com/alc): Learn to build with AI coding tools

Three paths available:
- Cursor path: Install Cursor AI editor, build a personal website, deploy to Vercel
- Claude Code path: Install Claude Code CLI, build a tweet automation agent, deploy to Firebase
- OpenClaw path: Install OpenClaw agent platform, build website + email, deploy

Post-deploy shared steps: open-source PR to cursorboston.com, Loom showcase videos, 5-year vision, AI-generated custom projects

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://your-domain.com/legal/privacy-policy): COPPA, FERPA, GDPR, CCPA compliant
- [Terms of Service](https://your-domain.com/legal/terms-of-service): Account rules, payments, AI features
- [Cookie Policy](https://your-domain.com/legal/cookie-policy): Essential, functional, and analytics cookies
- [Data Policy](https://your-domain.com/legal/data-policy): Learning data handling and third parties
- [Student Privacy](https://your-domain.com/legal/student-privacy): COPPA under-13, FERPA, parental rights
- [Acceptable Use](https://your-domain.com/legal/acceptable-use): Prohibited activities and AI usage rules

## Optional

- [Extended Details](https://your-domain.com/llms-full.txt): Full technical details for AI agents
- [Sitemap](https://your-domain.com/sitemap.xml): All public pages
